message:
wa-dug.4: comprehensive environment detection edge-case tests (49 new tests)

Add thorough test coverage for the environment detection API covering
serde roundtrips, detection edge cases, and auto-config boundary conditions.

Test categories added:
- Serde roundtrip tests for all public types (11 tests): WeztermCapabilities,
  WeztermInfo, ShellInfo, SystemInfo, DetectedAgent, RemoteHost,
  ConnectionType, ConfigSource, DetectedEnvironment, ConfigRecommendation
- Shell detection edge cases (5 tests): fish, zsh, unknown shells, None/empty
- Agent detection edge cases (8 tests): empty panes, no-match titles,
  case insensitivity, partial matches, OpenAI→Codex, empty/None titles,
  confidence and pane_id verification
- Remote detection edge cases (9 tests): WSL, Docker, Unknown domains,
  local exclusion (case-insensitive), empty panes, host grouping,
  host separation, cwd-based inference
- Compound AutoConfig scenarios (12 tests): multi-condition stacking,
  load/memory/remote boundaries, production hostname variants,
  duplicate agent dedup, recommendation source validation
- WeztermCapabilities defaults and WeztermInfo missing state (2 tests)
- ConnectionType equality (1 test)

Total environment tests: 16 → 65 (+49)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
